final:
module top_module(
    input [7:0] inv_A,
    input [7:0] B,
    input [7:0] C,
    input [7:0] D,
    input S0,
    input S1,
    output reg [7:0] Y
);always @(*) begin
    case ({S1, S0})
        2'b00: Y = inv_A;
        2'b01: Y = B;
        2'b10: Y = C;
        2'b11: Y = D;
    endcase
end

endmodule
